zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna de Botreaux於1311年出生在英國可瓦爾特希迪時，她的父親William de Botreaux66歲，母親Dionisia de Champernon32歲。她於1334年與William de Basset II在英國可瓦爾特希迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年11月28日在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾特希迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna de Botreaux于1311年出生在英国可瓦爾特希迪时，她的父亲William de Botreaux66岁，母亲Dionisia de Champernon32岁。她于1334年与William de Basset II在英国可瓦爾特希迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年11月28日在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾特希迪。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna de Botreaux was born in 1311, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, her father, William de Botreaux, was 66 and her mother, Dionisia de Champernon, was 32. She married William de Basset II in 1334, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 November 1361, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna de Botreaux est née en 1311, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William de Botreaux, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Dionisia de Champernon, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William de Basset II en 1334, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 novembre 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna de Botreaux 1311 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Botreaux 66 und ihre Mutter Dionisia de Champernon 32. Sie hat 1334 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England William de Basset II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. November 1361 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Botreaux è nata il nel 1311 nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England, sua padre, William de Botreaux, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, Dionisia de Champernon, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William de Basset II nel 1334, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 novembre 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Tehidy, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna de Botreauxが1311年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディで生まれた時，父William de Botreauxは66歳，母Dionisia de Champernonは32歳であった。1334年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディでWilliam de Basset IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年11月28日に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルテヒディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna de Botreaux(이)가 1311년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Botreaux(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia de Champernon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 William de Basset II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 11월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 테히디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Botreaux nasceu em 1311, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Botreaux, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Dionisia de Champernon, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Basset II em 1334, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna de Botreaux родилась в 1311 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Botreaux было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia de Champernon, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Basset II в 1334 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 ноября 1361 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna de Botreaux nació en 1311, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Botreaux, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Dionisia de Champernon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William de Basset II en 1334, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
